description_long: This ornate ceiling-mounted sconce features a circular arrangement of six individual lamp shades, each supported by a delicately curved arm. The arms are adorned with intricate scrollwork and decorative crystal-like beads, giving the fixture a luxurious and classical appearance. The central stem is robust and elegantly detailed, connecting to a chain and ceiling plate for secure suspension. Each lamp shade is conical and appears to be made of a fabric or matte material, contrasting with the glossy metallic frame. The overall design is symmetrical, with the decorative motifs and crystal accents evenly distributed around the fixture. The sconce exudes a vintage, opulent charm suitable for upscale urban interiors or historic public spaces.
description: A luxurious, vintage-style ceiling sconce with six fabric-shaded lamps, ornate scrollwork, and crystal bead decorations arranged in a circular pattern.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing all six lamp shades, ornate scrollwork, and crystal bead decorations in a symmetrical circular arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the scrollwork and the alignment of the lamp shades, with the central shade most prominent.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this angle again displays the full circular arrangement and decorative elements, emphasizing the symmetry.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction of view 1, showing the same features with a different lamp shade in the foreground.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and ornate, this fixture features classical scrollwork, crystal bead accents, and fabric lamp shades, evoking a sense of opulence and traditional elegance.
